    • Full-sib families with the fsfhap caller

Design-derived expected heterozygosity from the pedigree inbreeding coefficient

Source: R/fsfhap.R
dot-fsfhap_phet.Rd

phet = (1 - F)/2 when F in 0,1 (TASSEL's ViterbiAlgorithmPlugin), else the default fallback (TASSEL probHeterozygous = 0.07). Keeps phet design-derived, not a magic constant. See [no-hardcoded-design-params].

Usage

.fsfhap_phet(F, default = 0.07)

Arguments

F

Inbreeding coefficient (pedigree column 7 / 1 - 0.5^nself).

default

Fallback when F is outside 0,1.

Value

The expected-heterozygosity scalar for .fsfhap_impute().
